• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with 3D WebGL particle effects and shake animation
  • Supports 5 selectable response personalities: friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, roast
  • Uses OpenRouter API to generate short, style-matched answers for user questions
    magicBall.classList.add('is-shaking')
    const replyText = data.choices?.[0]?.message?.content

This web application simulates an interactive Magic 8 Ball with animated 3D visual effects. Users can input questions, choose a response personality, and receive tailored AI-generated answers. It leverages Three.js for particle animations and the OpenRouter API to deliver brief, style-matched responses.
